title: About Me
story: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on building practical software that solves operational problems clearly and reliably. My work spans responsive interfaces, backend APIs, database design, and deployment workflows.
I have built and worked on backend-heavy systems where API design, authentication flows, and scalable architecture were critical to the product's success and maintainability.
Alongside software, I am actively learning IoT and embedded systems by working with Arduino, ESP8266/ESP32, and real device communication to understand hardware-software integration deeply.
My problem-solving approach is shaped by real-world constraints like performance, cost, usability, and reliability, rather than only theoretical or tutorial-based learning.
My long-term focus is to build simple, reliable, and affordable products that solve everyday operational problems using a combination of software and connected hardware.
highlights: Full-stack dev with real backend & SaaS experience
Designs scalable APIs & clean data architectures
Building IoT + embedded systems with real hardware
Solves real-world problems, not just tutorial tasks
Focused on simple, reliable, practical products
